name: Troublemaker
description: A fully automatic Vladof pistol that combines strong per-shot damage with the manufacturer's trademark fire rate. Compared with bulkier Bandit-style pistols, it gives up magazine size for better accuracy and more manageable recoil. The result is a sidearm that still feels aggressive, but less sloppy than other high-capacity bullet hoses.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
